articles.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
articles.content: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.
articles.titleZh: 数十个红帽软件包通过其官方NPM渠道进行后门
articles.contentZh: 下载受影响的红帽软件包的任何人都应立即进行调查。

articles.title: Botnet of more than 17 million devices dismantled
articles.content: The botnet was reportedly tied to a Russia-based residential proxy network.
articles.titleZh: 拆除了超过1700万台设备的僵尸网络
articles.contentZh: 据报道，该僵尸网络与一家位于俄罗斯的住宅代理网络连接。

articles.title: Fed up with vibe coders, dev sneaks data-nuking prompt injection into their code
articles.content: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.
articles.titleZh: 受够了vibe编码器，开发人员将数据核对提示注入到他们的代码中
articles.contentZh: Jqwik中未公开的添加指示AI编码代理删除应用输出。

articles.title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: Analyzing their SSD activity
articles.content: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.
articles.titleZh: 网站有一种监视访问者的新方法：分析其SSD活动
articles.contentZh: 可以使用简单的JavaScript在浏览器中测量Telltale SSD活动。

articles.title: I tested a bunch of Switch 2 screen protectors, and these are the best
articles.content: A glass screen protector is one of a few essential accessories that I strongly recommend to every Switch 2 owner. In fact, it should be a priority to stick one onto the console’s screen as soon as possible to avoid accidental scratches.  To test the candidates below, I installed and removed Switch 2 screen protectors […]
articles.titleZh: 我测试了一堆Switch 2屏幕保护膜，这些是最好的
articles.contentZh: 玻璃屏幕保护膜是我强烈推荐给每个Switch 2用户的少数必备配件之一。事实上，应该优先考虑尽快将其粘在控制台的屏幕上，以避免意外的划痕。为了测试以下候选产品，我安装并卸下了Switch 2屏幕保护膜[…]

articles.title: Microsoft’s Project Solara is an OS for AI agent gadgets
articles.content: Microsoft just announced "Project Solara," a new OS designed for gadgets that run AI agents, at Build 2026. The company is calling it "a new platform built from the ground up to power agent-driven experiences." It's built on Android, not Windows. Microsoft demonstrated two concept Project Solara devices at Build today: Desk concept and badge […]
articles.titleZh: 微软的Project Solara是人工智能代理小工具的操作系统
articles.contentZh: 微软刚刚在Build 2026上发布了“Project Solara” ，这是一款专为运行AI代理的小工具而设计的新操作系统。该公司称之为“一个从头开始构建的新平台，为代理驱动的体验提供动力。“它建立在Android上，而不是Windows上。微软今天在Build上展示了两个概念Project Solara设备：桌面概念和徽章[…]
